title: woodfordia floribunda var. tomentosa
intro: Woodfordia floribunda var. tomentosa, also known as the madder tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Lythraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the madder tree can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
